headline: Elon Musk Tweeted Earlier: Plaid+ is canceled. No need, as Plaid is just so good; Model S goes to Plaid speed this week; 0 to 60mph in under 2 secs. Quickest production car ever made of any kind. Has to be felt to be believed.

headline: This Crypto Startup Aims To Become 'The Greenest Blockchain' To Fight Rising Environmental Concerns
